description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian dressed in modern urban attire, featuring a sleeveless puffer vest over a fitted athletic shirt and shorts. He wears a pair of high-top boots and sports a visible prosthetic leg, as well as a full-arm sleeve on his left arm. Accessories include a pair of large goggles, a necklace, and a utility pouch strapped around his waist. His right arm is bare except for a wristband, and his left arm is covered with a dark, patterned sleeve. The figure has a voluminous, tightly curled hairstyle and stands in a relaxed, upright pose with arms slightly outstretched. The overall appearance suggests a blend of athletic and streetwear influences, suitable for a contemporary city environment.
description: A modern urban male pedestrian with a puffer vest, athletic shorts, high-top boots, and a prosthetic leg, accessorized with goggles and a utility pouch. He has a voluminous curly hairstyle and stands in a relaxed pose.
description_view_0: Front view showing the puffer vest, goggles, necklace, utility pouch, and prosthetic leg, with both arms visible and slightly outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full-arm sleeve, utility pouch, and the profile of the boots and shorts.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the puffer vest, shorts, and the prosthetic leg, with both arms extended outward.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the bare right arm with a wristband, the side of the vest, and the profile of the boots and shorts.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless puffer vest, fitted athletic shirt, athletic shorts, full-arm sleeve, utility pouch, necklace, goggles
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
